top_signals.title: SoftBank sinks 8% as Japanese chip stocks track Wall Street AI sell-off
top_signals.summary: Japanese AI-linked stocks tumbled as a fresh rout in U.S. semiconductor shares spread across Asia after Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing's outlook failed to reassure investors.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
